protocol.name: moonshine_swapchain
protocol.copyright:

protocol.description:
This is a private Moonshine protocol. Regular Wayland clients must not use it.
It is functionally identical to gamescope_swapchain_factory_v2 / gamescope_swapchain from the Gamescope project, with interface names changed to moonshine_swapchain_factory_v2 / moonshine_swapchain so that the Moonshine-native Vulkan layer can be independent of the Gamescope layer.

request.name: override_window_content
request.description:
Xwayland creates a wl_surface for each X11 window. It sends a WL_SURFACE_ID client message to indicate the mapping between the X11 windows and the wl_surface objects.
This request overrides this mapping for a given X11 window, allowing an X11 client to submit buffers via the Wayland protocol. The override only affects buffer submission. Everything else (e.g. input events) still uses Xwayland's WL_SURFACE_ID.

request.name: swapchain_feedback
request.description:
Provide swapchain feedback to the compositor.
Provides image count ahead of time, and colorspace info for HDR.

description.summary: Communicate the active present mode to the compositor

request.name: set_hdr_metadata

description.summary: set HDR metadata for a surface

request.description:
Forward HDR metadata from Vulkan to the compositor.
HDR Metadata Infoframe as per CTA 861.G spec.
display_primary_{red,green,blue}_{x,y} / white_point_{x,y}: Color primaries and white point, coded as unsigned 16-bit values in units of 0.00002 (0xC350 == 1.0).
max_display_mastering_luminance: Max mastering display luminance in cd/m2 (uint16, 1 cd/m2 units).
min_display_mastering_luminance: Min mastering display luminance in units of 0.0001 cd/m2.
max_cll: Max content light level in cd/m2.
max_fall: Max frame average light level in cd/m2.

request.name: set_present_time
request.description: Sets the desired presentation time for the next commit (CLOCK_MONOTONIC). Resets to 0 after commit.

arg.name: desired_present_time_hi
arg.summary: high 32 bits of desired present time (ns)

arg.name: desired_present_time_lo
arg.summary: low 32 bits of desired present time (ns)

event.name: refresh_cycle

description.summary: compositor refresh cycle for this swapchain

event.description: Fired when the compositor's refresh period changes.

arg.name: refresh_cycle_hi
arg.summary: high 32 bits of refresh cycle in nanoseconds

arg.name: refresh_cycle_lo
arg.summary: low 32 bits of refresh cycle in nanoseconds

description.summary: swapchain was remotely retired by the compositor
